action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 15 achieved only 78.73% average accuracy, a significant drop from the best of 83.11% (iteration 10). Training logs show task 9 train_acc=79.5% and val_acc=79.7%, indicating severe underfitting compared to iteration 8's ~95% train_acc and ~82% val_acc. Analysis: model.py and predict.py appear correct; the regression is almost certainly in train.py (truncated in workspace). The most likely bug is scheduler.step() being called per-batch instead of per-epoch, or another subtle training loop error that prevents proper convergence. Decision: Rewrite train.py completely with clean, verified logic matching the proven recipe: IN21k ViT frozen backbone, cosine linear head, full feature replay, per-task head reinitialization, AdamW lr=1e-3, wd=1e-2, CosineAnnealingLR stepped once per epoch, label smoothing 0.1, feature noise 0.01, 20 epochs per task. Run training, verify predict.py offline, then submit eval to recover the ~83% baseline.
